## Result

Describe the observable outcome of this change. Include screenshots, logs, or an example when they make the result easier to review.

## Why

Explain the problem this solves and the tradeoffs behind the chosen approach.

## Validation

List the exact automated and manual gates you ran, with their results. State clearly if a relevant gate could not be run and why.

## Permissions and security boundaries

Describe any change to permission tiers, allowlists, secrets, authentication, network access, filesystem access, subprocesses, or model-controlled input. Write `No boundary changes` when none apply.

## Release and versioning

State whether this changes public behavior, dependencies, container output, release notes, or version metadata. Name every version source updated, or write `No release impact`.
